text: scoreReviews() used new Date('2026-06-30') which equals midnight UTC, making d > end TRUE for any review after 00:00 UTC on the last day. For Spain (UTC+2), this excluded the entire June 30 working day from Q2 scoring. Fix: always append 'T23:59:59.999Z' to string end-dates before parsing. Never parse a bare YYYY-MM-DD date as a range boundary without explicitly setting the end-of-day time.
